title: Clippit pptx split result
description: Result payload of `clippit pptx split` written to stdout on success (JSON mode).

input.description: Absolute path of the source .pptx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

outputDir.description: Absolute path of the directory containing the produced single-slide files.

manifest.description: Absolute path of the generated deck manifest (only present when --manifest was passed). The manifest can be fed back to `clippit pptx build run` to reassemble the deck; source PPTX sections are preserved when present.

count.description: Number of slide files written. Equal to slides.length.

slides.description: One entry per produced slide file, in the requested order.

index.description: 1-based index of this slide in the source presentation.

file.description: Absolute path of the produced single-slide .pptx file.

title.description: Slide title text extracted from the slide, when present.
